channel.title: Clam Bake Santa
channel.description: Daily haikus celebrating holidays and birthdays.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-28
item.description:
National Blueberry Pie Day
Warm crust hugs sweet blue / Fields burst forth with laughter's cheer / A slice of pure joy.

National Superhero Day
Capes flutter like dreams / Laughter sparks in sunlit skies / Heroes rise with hope.

Happy Birthday Harper Lee
Sunlight spills like gold / Laughter twirls through the air / Joy blooms in each heart.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-27
item.description:
National Prime Rib Day
Beef aromas rise / Sizzling dreams on the grill glow / Gather ‘round, taste joy.

World Tapir Day
Gentle giants roam / Muddy banks and leafy greens / Nature's quiet grace.

Happy Birthday Ralph Waldo Emerson
Cedar trees stand tall / Echoes of wisdom ring clear / Nature’s voice calls bright.

Happy Birthday Samuel Morse
Candles flicker bright / Notes of joy in the air sing / Morse's spark ignites.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-26
item.description:
National Pretzel Day
Twisted dough delights / Salted smiles and warm embraces / Crunch and chew unite.

National Richter Scale Day
Tremors bring us near / Nature's heartbeat pulses strong / Together we sway.

Happy Birthday John James Audubon
Feathers dance in flight / Nature's canvas comes alive / Joy in every brush.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-25
item.description:
World Penguin Day
Waddling in the snow / Little tuxedos rejoice / Joyful hearts unite.

National Zucchini Bread Day
Sun-kissed gardens sway / Zucchini's harvest whispers / Baking dreams arise.

Happy Birthday Ella Fitzgerald
Notes like silk arise / Velvet nights wrapped in moonlight / Joy dances and sings.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-24
item.description:
National Pigs in a Blanket Day
Savory hugs wrapped tight / Porky treasures snug in dough / Warm bites spark delight.

World Day of Veterinary Medicine
Gentle paws embraced / Healing hands weave love's soft thread / Whiskers twitch with joy.

Happy Birthday Anthony Trollope
Pages turn like leaves / Ink and dreams on parchment flow / Celebrations bright!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-23
item.description:
National Cherry Cheesecake Day
Juicy red jewels gleam / Creamy clouds on a plate / Forks meet blissful dreams.

World Book Day
Pages turn like leaves / Whispers of adventure / Worlds awaken wide.

Happy Birthday William Shakespeare
Quills dance on parchment / Ink spills tales like summer rain / Joy in every word.

Happy Birthday James Buchanan
Whispers of the breeze / Laughter blooms like wildflowers / Joy fills every heart.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-22
item.description:
Earth Day
Gentle breezes hum / Petals swirl in sunlit fields / Nature’s joy awakes.

National Jellybean Day
Rainbow jewels cascade / Sugary whispers of cheer / Hearts bounce with each taste.

Happy Birthday Immanuel Kant
Rich thoughts weave like silk / Pages turn with quiet joy / Cheers echo through time.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-21
item.description:
National Chocolate Covered Cashews Day
Silken chocolate drapes / Cashews nestled in sweet dreams / Joy melts with each bite.

World Creativity and Innovation Day
Brush strokes fill the air / Colors swirling, stories bloom / Dreams ignite like stars.

Happy Birthday Charlotte Bronte
Pages gently turn / Whispers of wild moors in bloom / Ink flows like warm tea.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-20
item.description:
National Cheddar Fries Day
Warm cheese drapes like sun / Crisp fries join in harmony / Savory smiles bloom bright.

Look-Alike Day
Mirrors of laughter / Identical smiles abound / Joyful hearts align.

Happy Birthday Joan Miro
Colorful swirls bloom / Paintbrush whispers joyous dreams / Laughter fills the air.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-19
item.description:
National Garlic Day
Golden cloves unite / Sizzling in a pan of cheer / Aromas embrace.

National Hummus Day
Chickpeas whirl and blend / Garlic whispers through the bowl / Dipped in joy we share.

Happy Birthday Glenn T. Seaborg
Waves of laughter swell / Gifts wrapped in sparkling dreams / Joy's sweet song abounds.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-18
item.description:
National Animal Crackers Day
Crunchy, sweet delight / Colorful critters dance bright / Joy in every bite.

National Linzer Torte Day
Golden pastry crust / Raspberry jewels tucked inside / Sweet hugs of delight.

Happy Birthday Clarence Darrow
Candles softly glow / Laughter dances in the air / Joy wraps around hearts.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-17
item.description:
National Cheese Ball Day
Creamy globes of joy / Crackers crunch in bright delight / Shared laughter abounds.

Blah Blah Blah Day
Bright balloons dancing / Laughter sparkles in the air / Joy blooms everywhere.

Happy Birthday Isak Dinesen
Candles flicker bright / Laughter spills like autumn leaves / Joy wraps around hearts.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-16
item.description:
National Eggs Benedict Day
Golden yolks glisten / Creamy hollandaise cascades / Brunch joy on our plates.

National Librarian Day
Pages softly turn / Whispers of knowledge bloom bright / Books cradle our dreams.

Happy Birthday Charlie Chaplin
Silent films unfold / Laughter dances like soft snow / A mustache's bright joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-15
item.description:
National Glazed Spiral Ham Day
Amber glaze glistens / Spices dance in warm delight / Savor every bite.

Tax Day
Papers neatly stacked / Spring blooms burst with joyful smiles / New hopes in budgets.

Happy Birthday Leonardo da Vinci
Brush strokes dance with light / Canvas whispers of genius / Joyful echoes bloom.

Happy Birthday Henry James
Candles flicker bright / Laughter dances in the air / Cake like clouds of joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-14
item.description:
National Pecan Day
Crunchy, sweet delight / Golden brown in warm sunshine / Nuts dance in delight.

Look Up at the Sky Day
Clouds dance like whispers / Sunbeams kiss the earth's soft skin / Hearts lift with the breeze.

Happy Birthday Loretta Lynn
Sunrise paints the sky / Guitar strings hum sweet stories / Laughter fills the air.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-04-13
item.description:
National Peach Cobbler Day
Golden peaches warm / Cinnamon swirls fill the air / Sweet joy in each bite.

Scrabble Day
Tiles rattling with glee / Words bloom like spring flowers bright / Laughter fills the room.

Birthday Thomas Jefferson
Candles flicker bright / Laughter dances on soft breeze / Gifts wrapped in delight.
